rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is an FRR44-based firm strategy moderator of advertising effectiveness on sales and Tobin’s q, whereas the cited paper focuses on transaction-based customer habit measurement/formation and customer profit effects in a retailer context. The notes show little direct construct or method overlap (advertising-share-of-voice/firm strategy vs. customer habits), and the evidence is only a single DOI match with no in-text context. This pattern looks most consistent with an incidental background mention rather than substantive use.
